content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.amazon.science/blog/a-better-training-method-for-reinforcement-learning-with-human-feedback", "source_title": "A better training method for reinforcement learning with human ...", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "The SeRA-trained model\u2019s win rate in these pairwise comparisons is higher than all three baselines\u2019 across the board, sometimes by as much a...", "direct_quote": "The SeRA-trained model\u2019s win rate in these pairwise comparisons is higher than all three baselines\u2019 across the board, sometimes by as much as 20% to 40%.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Direct preference optimization\nReinforcement learning is a trial-and-error method in which an agent interacts with the world and, depending ...", "direct_quote": "Direct preference optimization\nReinforcement learning is a trial-and-error method in which an agent interacts with the world and, depending on the actions it takes, receives greater or lesser rewards.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "The drawback of DPO is that it treats all training pairs equally: the reward is the same whether the preferred output is strongly preferred ...", "direct_quote": "The drawback of DPO is that it treats all training pairs equally: the reward is the same whether the preferred output is strongly preferred or only mildly preferred.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
